primaryUse: Agent demos, practical automation patterns, prompt/product iteration, and build-along AI workflows.

reusePolicy.summary: Use public code and videos as source anchors; separate licensed repos from no-license public examples.
reusePolicy.codeReuse: MIT-licensed repositories can be reused according to their licenses. No-license repositories are inspect-only.
reusePolicy.transcripts: Use public captions or transcripts for summary with attribution only.

sources.title: David Isler GitHub profile
sources.notes: Primary public code surface for agent and AI workflow demos.

sources.title: disler/the-library
sources.notes: Licensed public code example for retrieval.

sources.title: disler/multi-agent-postgres-data-analytics
sources.notes: Public agent workflow example; re-check license before reuse.

sources.title: IndyDevDan YouTube channel
sources.license: platform/copyright; captions are reference-only when available
sources.notes: Build-along video surface for agents, prompt engineering, and demos.

gaps: Some popular public repositories in this surface may have no detected license; keep them inspect-only unless a license is added.
